assertions.text: The agent generates a native Word (Docx) document.
The agent uses python-docx to produce the Word file.
The slash command invokes the office document generation workflow.
The agent can produce Docx, Xlsx, Pptx, or PDF outputs.
The agent creates a native Docx file using python-docx.
The agent relies on the python-docx/openpyxl/python-pptx/weasyprint toolchain for Office output.
